Heartbreak.text: The heart was made to be broken.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Each man kills the thing he loves.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Heartbreak.text: Never love anyone who treats you like you're ordinary.
Heartbreak.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: Where there is sorrow there is holy ground.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: With freedom, books, flowers, and the moon, who could not be happy?
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Healing.text: A flower blossoms for its own joy.
Healing.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: The aim of life is self-development.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Self-Worth.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Self-Worth.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: No man is rich enough to buy back his past.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: The past is of no importance. It is with the future that we have to deal.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Letting Go.text: Every saint has a past, and every sinner has a future.
Letting Go.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: Experience is simply the name we give our mistakes.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde

Moving On.text: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
Moving On.author: Oscar Wilde
